name: Steel HRC
impact: Direct COGS / realisation driver. 8%+ flat product cost move.
action: Lock forward contracts; review open steel RFQs
commentary: Chinese stimulus ($340B infra) lifting HRC to 6-month high; elevated 3-6 months.

name: Iron Ore
impact: Largest raw material input. Pellet premium widening on high-grade demand.
action: Lock high-grade pellet supply; cap premiums
commentary: Decarbonisation shifting burden to high-grade; 65% Fe spread at 14-month high.

name: Coking Coal
impact: Top variable cost in integrated route. Hot metal cost spike.
action: Secure tonnage; diversify origin; raise PCI
commentary: Australian outage + Queensland rail disruption tightening met coal sharply.

name: Coke
impact: Tracks coking coal. Blast furnace fuel cost pressure.
action: Review buy vs in-house coke; optimise coke rate
commentary: Following coking coal higher; tight Asian merchant coke availability.

name: Ferro Alloys
commentary: Power-driven cost inflation; SA load-shedding constrains ferrochrome.

name: Scrap
impact: EAF charge economics. Scrap-vs-pellet spread lever.
commentary: Indian containerised scrap softening on weak EAF demand, stronger rupee.

name: Copper
commentary: LME inventories 6-yr low; 500kt deficit projected Q4 on EV/renewables.

name: Natural Gas
impact: DRI / reheating cost. Gas-DRI route economics.
action: Hedge gas; review DRI vs coal route
commentary: Pipeline maintenance + cooling demand; pressuring gas-based sponge iron.

name: Freight
impact: Landed cost driver for seaborne ore/coal.
action: Secure COA cover; factor into origin choice
commentary: Capesize surge; Red Sea repositioning; ore & coal competing for tonnage.
